description: You are a VP of Operations at FastFlow Distribution. The logistics team needs a Shipping Cost Optimization Dashboard to identify which shipping modes are eroding margin. Using the order data at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\order_lines.csv, build an Oracle Analytics workbook named 'shipping_optimization' and save it as 'shipping_optimization.dva' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\. The workbook must include three canvases: 'Shipping Overview' analyzing total Shipping Cost across Ship Mode categories; 'Mode Efficiency Matrix' analyzing Shipping Cost and revenue efficiency by Ship Mode and Customer Segment, including a calculated column named 'Shipping_Ratio' (formula: Shipping Cost / Sales); and 'Profitability by Mode' analyzing total Profit and average Shipping_Ratio by Ship Mode. All canvases must use the order_lines dataset.
